response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust exposure in professional routing or navigation pipelines, and his core stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang — not the required C++ focus for routing tiling.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages
Experience with low-latency systems and distributed infrastructure at scale
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in routing or map tile pipelines
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang) does not align with core requirement of C++
Lack of explicit experience with navigation systems, routing algorithms, or geospatial tiling
